description: Strategy checkpoint records — regime detection to strategy routing decisions

regimeTypes.TRENDING_UP: ADX > 25 + price above EMA55 → full long strategies
regimeTypes.TRENDING_DOWN: ADX > 25 + price below EMA55 → block longs, short exit signals
regimeTypes.RANGING: ADX < 20 + BB width normal → longs allowed, wider SL (1.5x ATR), 75% sizing
regimeTypes.HIGH_VOLATILITY: ADX < 20 + BB width > 1.5x normal → longs allowed, wider SL (1.8x ATR), 50% sizing
regimeTypes.EMA_CONVERGENCE: EMA8 ≈ EMA21 ≈ EMA55 within 0.5% → block ALL trading
regimeTypes.BREAKOUT_FORMING: BB squeeze (width < 50th pct) + volume accumulation → breakout imminent
regimeTypes.TREND_EXHAUSTION: ADX declining from peak + RSI divergence → trend reversal possible

routingVersion: 2.0 — 36-cell strategy matrix (6 coins × 7 regimes) with Q-series per-cell combos

records.note: Sustained uptrend — WaveRider primary strategy active
Bearish trend + BTC long blacklisted (OOS 40%) — short signals used as exit indicators only

indicators.emaSpread: EMAs close but slight bullish bias

records.note: Regime shift from trend to range — SL widened to 1.5x ATR, sizing reduced to 75%
BB width 1.95x normal — high volatility regime. Position halved, SL widened to 1.8x ATR. DOGE long degraded (WR 30.3%) — extra caution.
EMAs converged within 0.12% — no directional edge. ALL trading blocked until regime resolves.

indicators.emaSpread: Price near lower BB, slight bearish EMAs

comboRouting.reason: Ranging regime + price at lower BB → mean-reversion signal triggered

records.note: Regime resolved from convergence → ranging. I1c mean-reversion combo activated with triple filter confirmation.

comboRouting.reason: Trending regime + price at VP POC support + daily trend bullish → triple confluence

records.note: Strong uptrend resumed. N1 Triple VP strategy activated — highest confluence combo (86.7% WR).

comboRouting.reason: 36-cell matrix routing: BTC in TRENDING_DOWN regime → Q3 combo (MACD divergence + SuperTrend filter)

records.note: Q-series 36-cell routing active. BTC TRENDING_DOWN → Q3 MACD+ST short. All long strategies blocked. 100% IS win rate for this cell.

comboRouting.reason: 36-cell matrix: BTC in TRENDING_UP → Q8 Head-and-Shoulders + Volume divergence (counter-trend short)

records.note: Even in TRENDING_UP, BTC long is blacklisted (OOS 40%). Q8 H&S short catches reversals within uptrends — 85.7% win rate.

indicators.emaSpread: EMAs stacked bullish but compressed — squeeze building

comboRouting.reason: BB width at 38th percentile after 12-candle compression → breakout imminent. Waiting for expansion trigger.

records.note: BB Squeeze detected after 12 candles of compression. BB width 30% of normal — extreme squeeze. Breakout direction determined by EMA alignment (bullish).

comboRouting.reason: High volatility + price at Volume Profile POC → counter-trend bounce. N2 combo overrides DOGE long degradation (87.5% WR, PF 12.34).

records.note: Regime-specific combo routing: N2 VP Counter active despite DOGE long being normally degraded. High WR combo (87.5%) with strict filtering justifies entry at reduced size.

records.routingDecision: 36-cell matrix: BNB in TRENDING_UP → WaveRider with WFO OOS validation at 80.3% win rate
records.note: Consistent trending_up regime for BNB. WFO walk-forward validation confirms strategy reliability.

records.routingDecision: 36-cell matrix: BTC regime flipped from TRENDING_DOWN to TRENDING_UP. MACD divergence generated counter-trend short — higher risk but validated by ADX strength.
records.warning: Counter-trend trade in strong uptrend — ADX 53.6 indicates powerful momentum against position
records.note: Regime change detected. Counter-trend short is aggressive — AI oversight critical for position management.

indicators.emaSpread: All EMAs below price — strong bullish arrangement

aiReview.reasoning: MACD_div entry but market reversed — EMA bullish arrangement + ADX 53.6 confirms strong uptrend against short position

records.note: AI position review checkpoint — MiniMax M2.7 correctly identified adverse market structure and recommended EXIT_NOW. This checkpoint demonstrates real-time AI oversight of strategy signals.

Daily portfolio checkpoint. Total drawdown 0.11% — well within risk limits. AI oversight has prevented 4 potential large losses via EXIT_NOW signals. 1 human manual override demonstrates human-in-the-loop safety.
